story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_0200_10: (“At last, I can finally give my all.”)
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_0300_10:
(But I’m sure Geeta can handle my arc suit’s
surprise reveal!)
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_0400_10:
Touch my heart with your noble spirit and
make it shine!
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_0600_10:
It’s been a while since I’ve had such a
thrilling battle!
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_1000_10: Let your hearts shine with ours! Glimmora!
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_1200_10: (An arc suit! She’s made the role her own!)
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_1300_10: I feel so alive! I can’t hold back!
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_1500_10:
I’m thrilled to meet an opponent I can go all
out against!
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_1700_10:
You’ve still got some fight in you, right,
Diantha?! Show me how high you can climb!
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1001_1900_10:
Let us aim for greater heights with shining
hearts!
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1101_2000_20:
The two battled for some time, as if they
were young girls again, with joy and a 
brilliant shine in their hearts—
story_arceus_10_11000/2401_1101_2100_20:
a shine that was also etched into the hearts
of all those watching.
